_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "accounts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "balance" INTEGER NOT NULL, "provider" TEXT NULL, "phone_number" TEXT NULL, "icon" TEXT NOT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_archived" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_archived" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "categories" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "icon" TEXT NOT NULL, "color" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "parent_id" TEXT NULL, "is_system" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_system" IN (0, 1)), "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "transactions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_id" TEXT NULL, "destination_account_id" TEXT NULL, "loan_id" TEXT NULL, "category_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "tracker_id" TEXT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "provider" TEXT NULL, "sender" TEXT NULL, "recipient" TEXT NULL, "reference" TEXT NULL, "raw_sms" TEXT NULL, "sms_timestamp" INTEGER NULL, "balance_after" INTEGER NULL, "source" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "budgets" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "category_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "period" TEXT NOT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "rollover" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("rollover" IN (0, 1)), "rollover_type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none', "rollover_cap" INTEGER NULL, "start_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "end_date" INTEGER NULL, "notification_threshold" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.8, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "budget_periods" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "budget_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "period_start" INTEGER NOT NULL, "period_end" INTEGER NOT NULL, "allocated" INTEGER NOT NULL, "spent" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "rolled_from" INTEGER NULL, "rolled_to" INTEGER NULL, "is_closed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_closed" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "daily_snapshots" ("date" TEXT NOT NULL, "total_income" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_expense" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "net_cashflow" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "by_category" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "day_of_week" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "is_weekend" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_weekend" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("date"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "monthly_snapshots" ("year_month" TEXT NOT NULL, "total_income" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_expense" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "net_savings" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "by_category" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "by_day" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "avg_daily_spend" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "top_merchants" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("year_month"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "app_settings" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "trackers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "icon" TEXT NOT NULL, "color" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_archived" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_archived" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "savings_goals" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "current_amount" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "target_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "color" TEXT NOT NULL, "icon" TEXT NOT NULL, "tracker_id" TEXT NULL, "is_completed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_completed" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "savings_goal_contributions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "savings_goal_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "loans" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "remaining" INTEGER NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "provider" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "sender" TEXT NULL, "reference" TEXT NULL, "disbursed_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "due_at" INTEGER NULL, "paid_at" INTEGER NULL, "tracker_id" TEXT NULL, "interest_rate" REAL NULL, "installment_amount" INTEGER NULL, "total_installments" INTEGER NULL, "paid_installments" INTEGER NULL, "frequency_in_days" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "recurring_transactions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "category_id" TEXT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "frequency" TEXT NOT NULL, "interval_value" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "next_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "end_date" INTEGER NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', "tracker_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "subscriptions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "category_id" TEXT NULL, "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "merchant_keywords" TEXT NOT NULL, "frequency" TEXT NOT NULL, "interval_value" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "next_due_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_paid_date" INTEGER NULL, "total_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "payment_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', "tracker_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
